vBRIEFInfo.description: Adoption blocker: a user running `task migrate:vbrief` directly (not via the agent setup skill) gets no preflight checks and hits raw subprocess failures when uv / migrator script / Taskfile include is missing. Add `task migrate:preflight` and have `migrate:vbrief` self-invoke it.

plan.title: Add task migrate:preflight; have migrate:vbrief self-invoke it

narratives.Problem: The pre-cutover migration preflight (task resolvability, uv on PATH, migrate_vbrief.py present) is currently prescribed only on the agent-driven path (QUICK-START.md Step H.2; skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md Environment Preflight). A user who follows main.md Migrating from pre-v0.20 and runs `task migrate:vbrief` directly gets none of those checks: failures surface as raw subprocess errors (uv not found, FileNotFoundError) with no remediation pointer. This is an adoption blocker for any non-agent entry path (CI runs, scripted upgrades, ops engineers).
narratives.Overview: Two complementary surfaces. (1) Add a new aggregate task `migrate:preflight` to tasks/migrate.yml that runs the three checks via a new scripts/migrate_preflight.py and prints a one-line remediation per failure. (2) Wire `migrate:vbrief` to invoke preflight before doing destructive work (either via deps: or as the first cmd), with a `--skip-preflight` opt-out for advanced users. Closes the parity gap between agent-driven and CLI-driven entry.
narratives.Background: tasks/migrate.yml today has only the `vbrief:` task (line 11) which calls scripts/migrate_vbrief.py directly. The agent path enforces preflight in skill prose (skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md lines 47-63) but that contract is not reified as a runnable task.
narratives.Constraint: MUST NOT regress the existing `task migrate:vbrief` invocation surface. MUST honor `--skip-preflight` so advanced users (and the agent path that ALREADY ran preflight inline) can opt out without redundancy. MUST coordinate with #792 if it lands first: both touch uv-detection logic and should share one helper rather than each re-implementing `shutil.which('uv')`.
narratives.Risk: Medium. Adding preflight as a `migrate:vbrief` precondition risks breaking edge cases where users already had a working setup and don't want the extra check. Mitigation: --skip-preflight opt-out, exit-early with clear reason if any check fails, never run preflight twice when invoked from the agent path (skip-preflight env var or arg).
narratives.Outcome: Acceptance: (1) `task migrate:preflight` exists and runs the three checks (resolvability, uv, migrator script); (2) each failing check prints a specific remediation pointer; (3) `task migrate:vbrief` invokes preflight before destructive work; (4) `--skip-preflight` opt-out is documented and tested; (5) tests/cli/test_migrate_preflight.py covers each failure mode and the all-pass case; (6) main.md Migrating from pre-v0.20 mentions running migrate:preflight first.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_migrate_preflight.py (new): four test cases - all-pass, missing uv, missing script, unresolvable task. Use unittest.mock.patch for shutil.which / Path.is_file as needed. Plus an integration test that runs `task migrate:vbrief --skip-preflight` against a fixture project to confirm opt-out works.
narratives.Action: 1. Add scripts/migrate_preflight.py implementing the three checks. 2. Add `preflight:` task to tasks/migrate.yml. 3. Wire `vbrief:` to depend on `preflight` (or run it inline) with --skip-preflight opt-out. 4. Cross-reference from main.md Migrating from pre-v0.20 and from skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md (point at the new task). 5. Add tests. 6. Run task check. 7. CHANGELOG entry.
narratives.Urgency: Adoption blocker for the CLI-driven upgrade path. Sequence with #792: if #792 lands first, the uv helper introduced there should be the foundation for #793's uv check rather than a parallel implementation.

items.title: Add scripts/migrate_preflight.py with the three checks

narrative.Action: New script that mirrors skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md Environment Preflight steps 1-3. Argparse: --project-root <path>. Returns 0 on all-pass, 1 on any failure. Prints one line per check (CHECK <name>: PASS|FAIL <remediation>). If #792 lands first, import the uv helper from run.py rather than re-implementing shutil.which('uv').

New task block in tasks/migrate.yml dispatching to the preflight script, mirroring the dir/env/cmds shape of the existing `vbrief:` task (USER_WORKING_DIR, PYTHONUTF8=1, uv run python {{.DEFT_ROOT}}/scripts/migrate_preflight.py). desc string per main.md style.

items.title: Have migrate:vbrief invoke preflight before destructive work

narrative.Action: Either add `deps: [preflight]` to the `vbrief:` task, or prepend a preflight invocation to its `cmds:` block. Honor --skip-preflight and DEFT_SKIP_MIGRATE_PREFLIGHT=1 env-var bypass for the agent path. The agent setup skill ALREADY ran preflight inline, so it should pass --skip-preflight when it invokes migrate:vbrief.

items.title: Update skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md to delegate to the new task

narrative.Action: Replace the inline three-check prose (lines 47-63) with: `task migrate:preflight` is the canonical implementation; the skill calls the task and reports its output. Keep the prose as a fallback for environments where task is unavailable. Per main.md Preferred Workflow Tasks + Skills Together: skills MUST delegate to the canonical task implementation.
Add a one-liner: 'Run `task migrate:preflight` first to validate environment readiness; `task migrate:vbrief` will invoke this automatically unless --skip-preflight is passed.'

Four unit cases (all-pass, no uv, no script, no task resolvability) plus an integration case that runs `task migrate:vbrief -- --skip-preflight` against a fixture project (via tmp_path) and asserts preflight is skipped while migration proceeds.
'feat(migrate): add task migrate:preflight aggregate; migrate:vbrief now invokes it automatically (#793).'

items.title: Run task check and confirm clean

narrative.Action: Pre-PR gate. New test file satisfies forward-coverage rule.

x-tracking.estimated_size: M-L (new task + new script + skill + main.md + tests + CHANGELOG)
x-tracking.soft_dep_on: #792 (parallelizable, but if #792 lands first share its uv-detection helper instead of re-implementing)

x-swarm-guidance.rationale: Cross-cutting but well-bounded: 1 new task, 1 new script, 1 skill update, 1 docs cross-link, 1 test file. Agent should coordinate with the #792 worker via inbox if running in parallel to avoid duplicating uv-detection. If #792 has already landed, import its helper.
x-swarm-guidance.pr_title_suggestion: feat(migrate): add task migrate:preflight; migrate:vbrief self-invokes it (#793)

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
